title: Comparing Products
instruction: Complete the comparison of two products.
passage: Brand A butter costs £2.00 for 250g. Brand B costs £3.50 for ___g. To compare, we calculate the price ___ 100g. Brand A: £2.00 ÷ 2.5 = ___ per 100g. Brand B: £3.50 ÷ 5 = ___ per 100g. Brand ___ is better value.
